general.prompt: What natural disaster gate-crashed Philly's Fourth of July party, forcing concertgoers to flee the Ben Franklin Parkway?
options: An unexpected visit from Taylor Swift's security team
A firework malfunction that turned the skyline into a volcano
general.summary: Severe storms delayed Philadelphia's Fourth of July celebration, forcing evacuations before it resumed after midnight.

general.prompt: Which former president showed up to the National Mall for a speech, after weather had already disrupted the 4th July celebrations?
options: Barack Obama in a beach hat
general.summary: Donald Trump arrived at the National Mall for a speech, after bad weather delayed the celebratory rally in Washington.

general.prompt: What was happening at Taylor Swift's Rhode Island estate while fireworks boomed on July 4th?
options: She was hosting a secret Kanye West diss track listening party
A squad reunion with Ed Sheeran and a llama
She was writing a song about the neighbor's cat
general.summary: Taylor Swift's Rhode Island house had its lights on as fireworks lit up the sky on July 4th.

general.prompt: What was the main theme of the July 4th live updates from CBS News?
options: A parade float caught fire and became a political statement
Everyone agreed on the best barbecue sauce for once
Fireworks spelled out the Constitution in cursive
general.summary: Americans celebrated 250 years of independence, though severe weather dampened proceedings in several parts of the country.

general.prompt: How many World Cup goals does Kylian Mbappé now have, leaving him just one behind Golden Boot rival Lionel Messi?
options: 18 and a half (he got robbed by the ref)
0 (he quit to join a boy band)
general.summary: Kylian Mbappé scored his 19th career World Cup goal on a penalty kick, moving within one of record holder Lionel Messi.

tech.prompt: Nintendo just sent a love letter to its fans! What’s the big message?
options: They’re launching a new console tomorrow
They’re shutting down the Switch eShop
tech.summary: Nintendo shared a message with fans emphasizing its commitment to originality.

tech.prompt: Google’s new commercial rewrites history! What document gets an AI makeover?
options: A Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
The Constitution of the United States
tech.summary: A new Google commercial imagines the Declaration of Independence being written with help from AI.

tech.prompt: Dragon Quest 11 S is coming to Switch 2—what juicy specs did Square Enix spill?
options: Frame rate and resolution details with two graphical options
Nintendo Switch 2 frame rate and resolution
tech.summary: Square Enix revealed Dragon Quest 11 S on Nintendo Switch 2 will have two graphical options with specific frame rate and resolution details.

tech.prompt: Resident Evil fans, mark your calendars! What’s coming on July 30?
options: A new Official Resident Evil Release
A new Resident Evil Requiem release
tech.summary: A new Resident Evil Requiem release is confirmed for July 30.

tech.prompt: Discs looking scratched? Hackers have a fix! What went open source?
tech.summary: An open source project for disk polishing was released, aiming to restore scratched optical media.

business.prompt: If you're driving in California and thinking about a DUI, better check your wallet — because your insurance is about to go full Hollywood stuntman. How much do California drivers pay for car insurance after a DUI?
options: No hike at all — you're covered
business.summary: California drivers face the nation’s second-steepest car insurance hike after a DUI conviction.

business.prompt: What happens when a heat wave meets a labor dispute? PECO workers said 'We're hot and we're out!' — but what are they striking over?
options: Free ice cream during heat waves
Better air conditioning for the office
business.summary: The strike centers mainly on wages and benefits, and PECO says it has plans to maintain service.

business.prompt: A passenger on a virus-stricken cruise ship expected fancy buffets and glacier views — but instead got a plot twist straight out of a disaster movie. How long was the Alaskan voyage?
business.summary: A serial cruiser on a 20-day Alaskan voyage faced stomach-sick passengers and strict disease protocols.

business.prompt: A 78-year-old man in Tallahassee probably thought he was just getting a Big Mac — but instead ended up in a fiery crash. At what time did this McDonald’s parking lot disaster happen?
business.summary: A 78-year-old man was killed in a fiery crash at a McDonald’s parking lot around 11:49 a.m. on Saturday.

business.prompt: A Denver bartender thought they were just serving drinks — until a couple made a very specific, very potato-based request. What food item did the woman ask about in a strange way?
business.summary: A Denver couple made a strange food request to a bartender, involving a baked potato.

sports.prompt: Who played the part of a human fireworks display AND a hero on Independence Day by crushing a walk-off homer for the Astros?
options: A literal bald eagle with a baseball bat
Casey Legumina (he was just the pitcher who served it up)
sports.summary: Yordan Alvarez hit a two-run walk-off home run in the bottom of the ninth inning to cap the Astros' wild comeback against the Rays.

sports.prompt: Which NFL receiver is playing a high-stakes game of 'hard to get' with the Commanders, and might be setting his bridge on fire in the process?
options: Terry McLaurin (he's just watching from the sideline with popcorn)
A very confused mailman holding a football
Jayden Daniels (he's the one being chased, not the chaser)
sports.summary: Brandon Aiyuk may be burning his bridge to the Commanders by going after Jayden Daniels, suggesting a beef between them.

sports.prompt: Which England soccer coach said Mexican fans were actually quite nice, despite everyone expecting them to throw tacos at the team bus?
options: Gareth Southgate (wrong coach, but he'd probably say something polite too)
The ghost of a disappointed English fan from 1966
A sombrero-wearing chihuahua with a whistle
sports.summary: Thomas Tuchel dismissed concerns about England's treatment in Mexico, saying it has been 'nicer than I expected' and fans are 'friendly and respectful'.

sports.prompt: Who was the rookie that lived up to the hype in his summer league debut, helping the Jazz cool down the Hawks?
options: A basketball that somehow learned to dribble itself
A literal jazz musician playing a saxophone on the court
Lauri Markkanen (he was probably watching from a spa)
sports.summary: Darryn Peterson led the Utah Jazz to a win over the Atlanta Hawks in Salt Lake City Summer League action.

sports.prompt: Which French superstar scored his 19th World Cup goal and is now breathing down Messi's neck for the Golden Boot record?
options: Antoine Griezmann (doing his best, but not quite there)
A very athletic baguette wearing cleats
Lionel Messi (he's the one being chased, not the chaser)
sports.summary: Kylian Mbappé scored his 19th career World Cup goal on a penalty kick, moving within one of Lionel Messi's record.

science.prompt: What cosmic objects are so huge and weird that even astronomers are like 'uh, our universe model might be broken'?
options: The Great Wall and the Cosmic Trench
The Giant Arc and the Big Ring
Two enormous structures — the Giant Arc and the Big Ring
The Milky Way and the Andromeda Galaxy
science.summary: Two enormous structures, the Giant Arc and the Big Ring, were discovered in the same region of deep space at the same cosmic distance, challenging current cosmological models.

science.prompt: What did a 2025 study reveal about dinosaurs just before the asteroid hit?
options: For much of the past century, scientists believed dinosaurs were already in decline when the asteroid struck
science.summary: A 2025 study published in Science found that dinosaurs were flourishing in diverse, thriving ecosystems in New Mexico just before the asteroid impact 66 million years ago, contradicting the long-held belief they were in decline.

science.prompt: How do you cool a data center in space when there's no air, no water, and no cooling towers?
options: Cooling a data centre on Earth can consume 10 to 30 per cent of its energy budget and millions of litres of water
Vast radiator panels bleeding heat as infrared light
science.summary: In orbit, data centers must use vast radiator panels to bleed waste heat away as infrared light, since there is no air or water available for traditional cooling methods.

science.prompt: Voyager 1 is still sending data from interstellar space—what powers this little champ that launched in 1977?
options: A nuclear power source the size of a car battery
The Voyager 1 probe, launched in 1977, is now so far from Earth that a radio signal takes over 22 hours to reach it
A solar panel the size of a football field
science.summary: Voyager 1 is powered by a nuclear power source the size of a car battery and is still sending data from interstellar space, despite being over 22 light-hours away from Earth.

science.prompt: How many new genetic locations linked to anxiety did a massive study of 700,000 people uncover?
options: A genetic analysis of nearly 700,000 people identified 74 distinct locations in the human genome tied to anxiety
science.summary: A genetic analysis of nearly 700,000 people identified 74 distinct genome locations tied to anxiety, 39 of which had never been linked to the condition before.
